column2: 通过了解机组规律可以猜测客户工作时间规律，进行维保节拍、沟通等时间确认。
column3: By understanding the rules of the unit, it is possible to guess the working hours of the customer and confirm the maintenance pace, communication, and other time constraints.

column2: 通过观察环境温度、气压信息，来评估对机组设备的启动影响。
column3: Evaluate the impact on the start-up of unit equipment by observing environmental temperature and pressure information

column2: 查看油耗和进风过滤阻力对燃油、过滤器进行维保节拍了解。
column3: Understanding the maintenance rhythm of fuel and filters by checking fuel consumption and intake air filtration resistance

column2: 了解某天内功率各个时段有功功率、无功功率情况，用于合同，限功、额定、备用等功率匹配。
column3: Learn about the active power and reactive power in each period of a day, and match the contract, power limit, rated power, and standby power

column2: 通过发电有功功率展示该当前机组在一天中各个时间的工作情况，从而了解客户每天的用电情况，用电高峰期、用户稳定期等。
column3: Through the active power display of the current unit in each time of the day, so as to understand the customer's daily electricity consumption, peak consumption, user stability period, etc.

column2: 进风过滤阻力：用于查看环境恶劣程度，通过查看阻力大小判断是否需要清洗滤网，如：阻力增大到88Pa，则需要进行清洗。
column3: Inlet air filtration resistance: used to check the severity of the environment, by viewing the size of the resistance to determine whether it is necessary to clean the filter, such as: resistance increases to 88Pa, you need to clean.

column2: 油耗：用于预测加油，通过观察油耗使用情况，可了解在一天何时进行加油处理。
column3: Fuel consumption: Used to predict fuel consumption, by observing fuel consumption usage, you can know when to do fuel treatment in a day.

column2: 查看客户负载情况，知晓客户负载使用情况，为客户精准匹配功率段，可以为超出合同功率部分提供收费证明。
column3: Check the customer's load situation, understand the customer's load usage, accurately match the power range for the customer, and provide proof of charges for the excess power beyond the contract.

column2: 合同功率(w1)：租赁项目立项时与客户约定的使用功率。
column3: Contract power (w1) : the power used by the customer when the lease project is initiated.

column2: 限功功率(w2)：设定机组在一个合理的功率范围内进行发电运行，以防超功率运行损坏装备。
column3: Limited power (w2): Set the genset to operate within a reasonable power range to prevent equipment damage caused by excessive power operation.

column2: 额定功率(w3)：机组出厂的额定功率。
column3: Rated power (w3): The factory rated power of the genset

column2: 备用功率(w4)：机组可以达到的最大功率值。
column3: Backup power (w4): The maximum power value that the genset can reach

column2: 有功功率：有功功率是指单位时间内实际发出或消耗的交流电能量，是周期内的平均功率。查看有功负载情况。
column3: Active power: Active power refers to the actual amount of AC energy generated or consumed per unit of time, and is the average power during a cycle. Check the active load situation.

column2: 无功功率：客户设备端电动机负载情况。
column3: Reactive power: the load of the motor at the customer's device

column2: 谐波分析总谐波畸变率
column3: Harmonic analysis Total harmonic distortion rate

column2: 有功功率：在单位时间内，最大有功功率值，单位kW。

column2: 发电量：在单位时间内，累计的总发电量，单位：kW·h。
column3: Power generation: The cumulative total power generation per unit time, in kW · h

column2: 注：在客户工作规律图表中，因取的是最大有功功率，发电量在该图表中不等于有功功率 * 时间。
column3: Note: In the customer work pattern chart, since the maximum active power is taken, the power generation in this chart is not equal to the active power * time

column3: Check the customer's load situation, understand the customer's load usage, accurately match the power range for the customer, and provide proof of payment for the portion exceeding the contract power

column3: Limiting power (w2): Set the genset to operate within a reasonable power range to prevent equipment damage caused by excessive power operation

column2: 备用功率(w4)：机组可以达到的最大功率值。

column3: Active power: Active power refers to the actual amount of AC energy generated or consumed per unit of time, and is the average power during a cycle. Check the active load situation.
